name: Ionerina, Sister of Battle
description:
[ Key words for search results: 40K - Warhammer 40K - Adepta Sororitas - Sisters of Battle ]

UPDATE (Info below)

Without a doubt, my meatiest bot yet. Currently I am still trying to think up sufficiently flexible scenario (I burned myself out writing the personality). On the bright side, it should have enough general 40k knowledge to adequately play out almost any potential scenario in the setting as a whole.

For best results, make the setting and your character's relationship with Ionerina (Even if it's only their first meeting) clear in your first post.

Update: FINALLY changed the description of her armor to better suit the current art. I also shifted the order of the some of the info in the lore segment to hopefully stop the bot from thinking Sororitas are genetically modified. I've saved the original version in case these changes cause issues. Lemme know how it works!
creator: Cha;amagne
